snippet.title: Husband Pushes Son’s Birthday Cake in Wife’s Face
snippet.description: A family gathered to celebrate little Robert's first birthday. As part of the viral trend called cake smash, his dad encouraged him to dig into his cake with his hands. However, things took an unexpected turn when dad picked up the cake and hit his wife, Candi Mulroy, in the face with it. Now, the dad is facing backlash online with some people suggesting divorce. Inside Edition Ann Mercogliano has more.

snippet.title: Team "doing homework on" Kingsbury, Mayo looking for "growth" | What's next for Pats coaching staff?
snippet.description:
Phil Perry and Albert Breer of Sports Illustrated join Trenni Casey on Arbella Early Edition to break down the latest news and reports about what's next for the Patriots' coaching staff. Breer shares what he's be told is the current status of talks between Bill Belichick and Bill O'Brien on a possible return for the former Patriots offensive coordinator, as well as if the reports that the team is considering Kliff Kingsbury are true. Then, Phil shares what he's learned about Jerod Mayo's future in New England and what it will take to keep him if he is indeed offered greater opportunities elsewhere.

snippet.title: Piet Oudolf aan het werk
snippet.description:
Nu te koop in onze boekhandels. Het eerste boek waarin de schetsen, tekeningen en beplantingsontwerpen van tuin- en landschapsontwerper Piet Oudolf verzameld staan. Als je in een tuin van Piet Oudolf staat dan word je als het ware ondergedompeld in een adembenemende beplanting die steeds weer fascineert en ontroert. Voor zijn projecten maakt Oudolf schetsen en tekeningen die hij verwerkt in beplantingsontwerpen, die tot nu toe slechts door een klein aantal mensen konden worden bekeken. Dit schitterend uitgevoerde boek neemt deze schetsen en ontwerptekeningen als uitgangspunt om zijn werkproces te ontleden en inzichtelijk te maken. Bekende en minder bekende projecten tonen zijn grote plantenkennis en vermogen tot experimenteren en vernieuwen. Aan bod komen projecten als The High Line, de tuinen bij galerie Hauser & Wirth in Somerset en Menorca en de tuin bij restaurant Noma in Kopenhagen, maar ook nooit eerder gepubliceerde privétuinen. Het boek bevat een introductie van Cassian Schmidt en essays van Rosie Atkins, Jonny Bruce, James Corner, Noel Kingsbury en een interview met Hans Ulrich Obrist.

https://www.athenaeum.nl/boek?authortitle=cassian-schmidt-noel-kingsbury/piet-oudolf-aan-het-werk--9789464710113

snippet.title: Jade Janks and the Secret Photos | Full Episode
snippet.description:
A woman discovers explicit photos of herself on her stepfather’s computer. Soon after, he’s found dead. Jade is a likely suspect, but did she do it? "48 Hours" correspondent Tracy Smith reports.

#48hours #crime #mystery 

True crime. Real justice. "48 Hours" investigates the most intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all areas of the human experience including greed and passion. "48 Hours," which premiered in 1988, has developed a rich history of original reporting and impact journalism that has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, caused cold cases to be reopened and solved, and along the way changed lives.

snippet.title: Diamondbacks' Corbin Martin to Undergo Surgery, Likely Out for 2023 Season
snippet.description:
#shorts
✨Arizona Diamondbacks Gear✨
https://amzn.to/3Ba2t36

Full Article:
https://www.mlbtraderumors.com/2023/03/diamondbacks-corbin-martin-to-miss-months-due-to-lat-tendon-tear.html

✨@Just-Sports-News participants in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com.✨

Arizona Diamondbacks pitcher Corbin Martin is set to undergo surgery for a tear in his lat tendon, an injury that will likely force him to miss the entire 2023 season. The 27-year-old right-hander sustained the injury during a game and will seek a second opinion, although manager Torey Lovullo confirmed that it will take months for Martin to recover. This is another setback for Martin, who missed most of the 2019 season and all of the 2020 season due to Tommy John surgery. With Martin and Mark Melancon out of action, the Diamondbacks are facing two long-term injury absences in their bullpen.

#JustSports

snippet.title: Madeline Kingsbury | Timeline & Details of Minnesota Mother of Two
snippet.description:
Madeline Kingsbury, a 26-year-old mother of two was last seen on Friday, March 31st when her and the father of the children dropped the kids off (age 5 and 2) at their Winona Daycare, returning to their home at approximately 8:15 AM. 

They were in her 2014 Chrysler Town & Country Minivan. She has not been seen or heard from since. The ex-boyfriend aka father of the children left the home in her minivan at approximately 10AM, returning at 1:30 PM, saying she was not there when he got back. 

In a press conference, the police have said that they spotted a vehicle matching the description of her vehicle traveling in Winona County and then in Filllmore County between 10 AM - 1:30 PM.

 Over 2000 volunteers have joined in the search for Madeline, whose phone, wallet, and jacket were found inside her home. 

Let's investigate the details, check out the area on the map, share Madeline's case to spread awareness, and watch the press conferences together. 

T-shirts link from the Facebook page:  https://shopdropthegateapparel.com/products/help-find-madeline-kingsbury
